commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an AgentSession system-prompt override path, reapplies the embedded prompt after active tool selection, and adds regression coverage for the embedded runner and session tool-selection flow.

PR surface: Source +44, Tests +73, Docs +1. Total +118 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main applies the OpenClaw prompt override before setActiveToolsByName, and that method rebuilds and writes agent.state.systemPrompt. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The only concrete repair is a mechanical removal of the release-owned CHANGELOG.md entry; the runtime fix otherwise appears reviewable.

target.title: fix: preserve embedded system prompt override
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes the embedded agent runtime prompt regression where active tool selection could replace the OpenClaw embedded system prompt with the generic coding-harness session prompt.

The root issue was that the embedded runner applied the OpenClaw system prompt override, then called `setActiveToolsByName(...)`. That method rebuilt the session base prompt and overwrote `agent.state.systemPrompt`, so some channel runs reached the model with the wrong prompt.

This PR makes the prompt override a real `AgentSession` state path instead of relying on private-field shims, then applies the embedded prompt override after tool activation in the runner.

Fixes #87807.

## Changes

- Add `AgentSession.setSystemPromptOverride(...)` so caller-owned prompts survive active tool changes.
- Update embedded prompt override application to use the public session override path.
- Keep fallback support for older/mock session shapes.
- Apply the embedded runner prompt override after active tool selection.
- Add regression coverage for:
  - prompt helper override behavior;
  - `setActiveToolsByName(...)` preserving an override;
  - embedded-attempt flow where tool activation tries to clobber the prompt.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/system-prompt.test.ts src/agents/sessions/sdk.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`
  - 5 files passed
  - 141 tests passed
- Crabbox/Testbox:
  - provider: `blacksmith-testbox`
  - lease: `tbx_01ksre2a023ssfqp0g5347r2en`
  - command: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/system-prompt.test.ts src/agents/sessions/sdk.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`
  - result: 5 files passed, 141 tests passed
